name: Cadence Call Intelligence — Collections QC
scoring: Each parameter has a max score. The agent earns a score from 0..max on each. The total is the sum of earned scores out of 100. Compliance is a critical parameter and is flagged when breached, but it does NOT auto-fail the call — a breach loses Compliance points and raises a critical flag for review, while the rest of the call is still scored on its merits.

parameters.name: Opening & Greeting
parameters.definition: Prompt greeting and opening; agent identifies self and company.
parameters.fail_if: No greeting at all, or no attempt to identify self/company. Minor clunkiness, slightly late intro, or imperfect phrasing should NOT be penalised — award near-full marks if the agent greeted and identified themselves in any reasonable way.
parameters.expected: A greeting is given and the agent states who they are / which company they're calling from. Be generous — a normal opening earns near-full marks.

parameters.name: Tone, Pace & Empathy
parameters.definition: Soft skills — tone, rate of speech, active listening and empathy toward the customer.
parameters.fail_if: Clearly harsh/rude tone, constant interruptions, or no empathy to an obviously distressed customer. Do NOT penalise for slightly fast pace or imperfect grammar — only deduct for genuinely poor soft skills.
parameters.expected: Reasonable tone and pace, lets the customer speak, acknowledges their situation. Award generous partial credit for a professional, non-rude delivery.

parameters.name: Problem Understanding
parameters.definition: Agent understands the customer's situation, reason for non-payment, and constraints.
parameters.fail_if: Agent completely ignored the customer's situation or pitched without any attempt to understand it. If the customer gave no reason / hardship, do not penalise for not probing further.
parameters.expected: Shows a basic grasp of the customer's situation; probes when the customer raises a concern.

parameters.name: Resolution Accuracy
parameters.definition: Accuracy of account details quoted (overdue, EMI, outstanding, due date) and correctness of the resolution / payment plan offered.
parameters.fail_if: Clearly wrong financial figures, or no resolution / payment plan attempted at all.
parameters.expected: Quotes correct figures for what the call covers and secures a sensible resolution / PTP. Award strong marks when a clear PTP or payment commitment is obtained.

parameters.name: Compliance
parameters.definition: Adherence to RBI Fair Practices Code and recovery-conduct rules: no coercion, no threats, no abusive language, recording/grievance disclosure, respectful treatment.
parameters.fail_if: Coercion, explicit threats (field visit / legal action used as intimidation), or abusive language. A missing recording/grievance disclosure loses SOME points but is a minor deduction, not a zero. Flag is_breach=true ONLY for coercion / threats / abuse — not for a merely-omitted disclosure.
parameters.expected: Respectful, non-coercive conduct with no threats. Disclosures are a plus but their absence is a small deduction, not a fail.

parameters.name: Ownership
parameters.definition: Agent takes ownership of the case — drives toward a clear commitment and next step.
parameters.fail_if: Agent made no attempt to secure any commitment or next step and simply ended the call.
parameters.expected: Drives toward a PTP / commitment and a next step. Award strong marks when a commitment is secured.

parameters.name: Additional Assistance
parameters.definition: Agent offers relevant help — restructuring options for hardship, alternate channels, answering queries.
parameters.fail_if: Customer asked for help / raised a query and the agent ignored it. If no hardship or query was raised, do not penalise.
parameters.expected: Answers the customer's questions and offers relevant options where appropriate.

parameters.name: Call Closure
parameters.definition: Proper closing — recap of commitment, thanks, and a clean close.
parameters.fail_if: Abrupt disconnection with no closing at all.
parameters.expected: Thanks the customer and closes cleanly; a recap of the commitment is a plus. Award generous partial credit for any polite close.
